response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified intro (00:00-01:02) and song performance (01:02-04:59). 2. Observed on-screen text identifying the song as 'ANIMA' by Kegani. 3. Used the search tool with query '毛蟹 ANIMA lyrics' to find the full lyrics. 4. Mapped the scenes and populated the JSON accordingly with metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Hakos Baelz introducing and performing the song 'ANIMA', originally by Kegani.

scenes.description: The performer introduces the song, speaking in both Japanese and English, and prepares to sing.
The performer sings the song 'ANIMA' while performing on a stage with changing visuals.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
魂の色は 何色ですか
「もういっそ 折れたままで」
捨てるほど 逃げ出すほど
強くないよ ほら
もう一度 鼓動高鳴る
何が正しいかなんて
わからないけど
形のないものばかりが
大切になって行く
飾らない言葉だけが
強く結ばれてる
また躓いて 転がって
それでも砕けない
魂の色は 何色ですか
ただ傷ついて 強がって
それでも見つけたいよ
魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
深い地の底で一人
扉と鍵を探す
おとぎ話は ほら
泡の様に全部消えて
葛藤 残像だけ
次の頁へ
伸びてく枝葉が分かれて
それぞれの道を行く
寂しい思い出だけが
強く根を張ってる
また貫いて失って
それでも挫けない
心はどこに 器はどこに
ただ残されて抜け落ちて
それでも伝えたいよ
魂の日々を
魂の意志を
ずっと ずっと
魂の色は 何色ですか
赤い色ですか 青い色ですか
魂の色は 魂の色は
何色ですか 何色ですか
透明な過去に 不透明な明日に
生きるあなたは 何色ですか
また躓いて 転がって
それでも砕けない
魂の色は 何色ですか
ただ傷ついて 強がって
それでも見つけたいよ
魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
ずっと ずっと ずっと ずっと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What is the color of the soul?
"I'd rather it stay broken"
I'm not strong enough to discard it or run away
Look, the heartbeat quickens once more
Though I don't know what is right
Only things without form become precious
Only unadorned words are tied strongly
I stumble and tumble again, yet I don't break
What is the color of the soul?
Just hurt, acting tough, yet I still want to find it
I am confirming the shape of the soul
Alone at the bottom of the deep earth, I search for the door and the key
The fairy tale, look, disappears completely like bubbles
Only conflict and afterimages remain
Extending branches divide toward the next page
Each going their own way
Only lonely memories strike deep roots
I pierce through and lose again, yet I do not falter
Where is the heart? Where is the vessel?
Just left behind, slipped away, yet I still want to convey it
The days of the soul, the will of the soul
Forever, forever
What is the color of the soul?
Is it red? Is it blue?
What is the color of the soul? What is the color of the soul?
What color is it? What color is it?
In the transparent past and the opaque tomorrow
What color are you living as?
I stumble and tumble again, yet I don't break
What is the color of the soul?
Just hurt, acting tough, yet I still want to find it
I am confirming the shape of the soul
Forever, forever, forever, forever

scenes.description: The song concludes, and the video fades out.
